name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, bounded Ground Route Authority, station-area freshness invalidation, safe GUI layout fallback, and 0.1.637 bootstrap resource governor that turns emergency survival churn into productive raw-resource reserve acquisition before higher-level facility and supply loops.
